Home › Blog › Build Website with AI

How to Build a Website with AI in 2026

By Lao Lu · Also on lusdaily.com

Step 1: Plan Your Site with AI

Describe your website idea to ChatGPT or Claude: "I want a portfolio website for a freelance photographer. Homepage, gallery, about page, contact form. Minimal and elegant style." The AI suggests structure, technologies, and drafts a site map.

🔥 Sponsored Recommendations We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you
Vultr

High-performance cloud servers. Get $300 free credit for new users.
Evoxt

Affordable VPS hosting starting at $2.99/mo. Global data centers.
Mesimgo

Reliable web hosting & cloud services at competitive prices.
xesim

International eSIM data plans. Use code laolu for exclusive discount.
DNSHE

Get a free domain + global DNS acceleration. Quick setup for your projects.

Step 2: Generate the Design

  • v0.dev or Claude Artifacts: Describe your design and get a working React component preview instantly.
  • AI image generators: Midjourney or DALL-E for hero banners and background graphics.

Step 3: Generate Code

  • Cursor or Windsurf: AI-native editors scaffold entire websites from prompts.
  • GitHub Copilot: In VS Code, describe in comments and AI generates the implementation.

Step 4: Content

AI drafts headlines, body copy, and meta descriptions. Edit for your voice. Claude writes natural copy; GPT is better for SEO optimization.

Step 5: Deploy Free

Cloudflare Pages or Vercel offer free hosting with GitHub auto-deployments. Push code and your site goes live in minutes. Custom domain: $10/year.

FAQ

Yes for simple-medium sites. Complex apps still need developers.

$0-20/month - AI generates code, free Cloudflare hosting, free stock photos.

30 min for landing page. 1-2 days for small business site.
